name: Uncommon New Firewall Rule Added In Windows Firewall Exception List
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Uncommon New Firewall Rule Added In Windows Firewall Exception List
SIGMA Description: Detects when a rule has been added to the Windows Firewall exception list

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('2004', '2071', '2097')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%action%2%' OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\program files (x86)*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\program files\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\system32\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\syswow64\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\winsxs\%') OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\perflogs*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\temp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\tmp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\users\public\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\tasks\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\temp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp\%')))) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\programdata\microsoft\windows defender\platform*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\msmpeng.exe%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Uncommon New Firewall Rule Added In Windows Firewall Exception List on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('2004', '2071', '2097')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%action%2%' OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\program files (x86)*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\program files\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\system32\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\syswow64\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\winsxs\%') OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\perflogs*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\temp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\tmp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\users\public\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\tasks\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\temp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp\%')))) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\programdata\microsoft\windows defender\platform*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\msmpeng.exe%'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Uncommon New Firewall Rule Added In Windows Firewall Exception List

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: frack113 SIGMA Title: Uncommon New Firewall Rule Added In Windows Firewall Exception List SIGMA Description: Detects when a rule has been added to the Windows Firewall exception list  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
